title: Crops growth detector
description: Enhance your farms with the new crops growth detector, a machine that outputs a redstone signal depending on the crops age.
body:
## Description
With the new Crops growth detector, you can easily build automatic farms without the need of worrying about "_when will my crop be grown?_".
***
## Blocks scheme of work
This block works similarly to a Comparator, but instead detects the crop current age and outputs a redstone signal, dependent of the same. Usually, the signal outputted is the double of the current age (this may vary on modded crops).
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_4ac4539e-1365-4782-8135-fb40e1db5860.png)
***
## Compatibility
The crops growth detector is compatible with any modded crop, always as the same is cataloged as a "crop" by the modder itself. Plants that can grow but aren't crops can't be detected.
***
## Legal information
- This mod is licensed under the MIT terms.
- You can download this mod and use it on any modpack, as always than the corresponding credits are given.
